completed_tasks.name: Implement SemanticScholarSource + tests
completed_tasks.notes: semantic_scholar_api.rs, integration tests, all additive edits to mod.rs/error.rs/paper.rs/rate_limiter.rs/crawl.rs/queries.rs. 9 new tests green. Smoke test against real S2 API passed.

completed_tasks.name: Smoke test: single paper from S2
completed_tasks.notes: cargo run --bin resyn -- crawl --source semantic_scholar --paper-id cond-mat/0010317 --max-depth 0 --db surrealkv://./data-s2-smoke. 1 paper fetched in 0.6s.

remaining_tasks.name: Crawl Feynman corpus (10 seeds × depth-2)
remaining_tasks.notes: Target: surrealkv://./data-kuramoto. Seeds: cond-mat/0203227, 0710.3256, cond-mat/0010317, cond-mat/0312131, cond-mat/0007235, cond-mat/0205009, nlin/0202034, cond-mat/0002374, 1005.1986, cond-mat/9801289. Unauthenticated (2200ms/paper). Expect ~500-2000 papers, ~30-90 min.

remaining_tasks.name: Export + verify pair presence
remaining_tasks.notes: export-louvain-graph --published-before 2014-12-31 --output prototypes/data/research_synergy_pre2015.json. Then run pair-check Python snippet.

remaining_tasks.name: Execute kuramoto_lbd_v03.ipynb
remaining_tasks.notes: Exit criterion: n_eval >= 3 AND BENCH_P10 > 0.15. jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute.

blockers.description: S2 API key applied for but not yet received. Crawl will run unauthenticated at 2200ms/paper (~1 rps for 2 calls/paper). ~500-2000 papers at depth-2 = 18-73 min.
blockers.workaround: Run unauthenticated. Set S2_API_KEY env var once key arrives — rate drops to 400ms/paper (5x faster).

human_actions_pending.action: Set S2_API_KEY env var once Semantic Scholar API key is received
human_actions_pending.context: Applied for key during this session. Without it, unauthenticated crawl takes ~18-73 min for depth-2. With key: ~4-15 min.

decisions.rationale: S2 returns externalIds.ArXiv directly on each reference. OpenAlex only returns opaque work IDs requiring N+1 lookups.

decisions.decision: External governor at 2200ms (unkeyed) covers both fetch_paper + fetch_references per paper
decisions.rationale: Each paper = 2 API calls. With S2's 1 rps limit, 2200ms external interval = ~0.9 rps total. Internal rate_limit_check zeroed (per-task fresh source means it was a no-op anyway).

decisions.decision: Old-format arXiv IDs (cond-mat/0010317) skip the Link creation, rely only on arxiv_eprint
decisions.rationale: Reference::get_arxiv_id() splits URL by '/' and takes last segment, which strips the category prefix from old-format IDs. arxiv_eprint fallback returns the full correct ID.

decisions.decision: Fresh DB at surrealkv://./data-kuramoto for Feynman corpus
decisions.rationale: Existing ./data has 383 LIGO/GW papers — wrong domain. Keep it untouched.

next_action: Set S2_API_KEY env var if available, then loop-crawl the 10 Feynman seeds at depth-2 into surrealkv://./data-kuramoto using --source semantic_scholar
context_notes: Implementation complete and tested. The hard part was discovering that old-format arXiv IDs (cond-mat/...) must NOT create Link objects — only arxiv_eprint — because get_arxiv_id() strips the category prefix when splitting URLs. The plan file at ~/.claude/plans/session-wrap-up-kuramoto-v03-foamy-wall.md has the full verification script including the pair-check Python one-liner and notebook invocation.
